roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY REQUESTED BY APD SENT
DEF ATTY NOT OF MOT & MOT TO LIMIT REST TO ACTUAL ECONOMIC LOSS FILED
/CAL:APD 1203,9PC MOTION TO TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY/DAWT/MO GRTD/CTORD:PROBATION BE TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SAN MATEO COUNTY//X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:COUNSEL STIPULATES TO RESTITUTION/CTORD:RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $961,68 TO STATE VICTIM COMPENSATION BOARD PLUS 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE/X:CR-110 FORM SIGEND, FILED & SERVED/

/CAL:SENTENCING/BE/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 2D/CTS:2 / WS/DNACOMP/SAORD/SA2:TEMPLE BAR, 540 HOWARD ST/SA1:PAUL MALLORY/X:COUNSELING AS DEEMED/REST//X:AFTER 12MOS, REDUCEABLE TO MISDEMEANOR/CONTD:2-06-12 REST HEARING/DOP/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 12-08-11/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:LISA DEWBERRY/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 11-14-11 (60TH)/987,2/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:REST HEARING/DAWT/CONTD: STATUS & OR TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWF/
